overall.description: A cinematic walkthrough from the video game Hogwarts Legacy, showing a Gothic castle entrance hall with students in robes, transitioning through massive carved wooden doors into the iconic Great Hall decorated with floating candles and a Christmas tree.

scene_state.functional_zone: Gothic castle entrance hall with statues and stained glass windows

events.description: camera turns right toward the large carved wooden door on the right wall
camera approaches close to the wooden door, focusing on the carved details and metal handles

agents.ego_description: walking through the stone entrance hall and approaching the large wooden door to the Great Hall

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes walking away from camera toward the stained glass windows
student in dark robes walking across the hall from left to right

entered.detail: high arched stone ceiling with ribbed Gothic architecture
three large arched stained glass windows emitting bright daylight
tall stone statues of robed figures standing in wall niches
massive dark wooden door with intricate carvings and metal ring handles
green garlands with red bows hanging from stone pillars

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a grand Gothic entrance hall with high vaulted ceilings and stained glass windows. The camera walks forward past stone statues and pillars decorated with Christmas garlands, then turns right to approach an imposing carved wooden door. Sparse crowds of students in robes walk through the hall as natural light filters through the windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: Great Hall entrance vestibule with house banners and suits of armor

events.description: large carved wooden doors swing open revealing the Great Hall interior
camera pans left to view the house banners and suits of armor along the walls

agents.ego_description: opening the large wooden doors and stepping into the Great Hall entrance area, looking around the vestibule

entered.detail: large vertical banners in red, blue, yellow, and green representing Hogwarts houses
full suit of medieval armor standing on stone pedestal
decorative patterned carpet runner on the stone floor
the threshold area leading into the main Great Hall chamber

segments.scene_description: The wooden doors open to reveal the Great Hall entrance. The camera steps through into a dimly lit vestibule lined with suits of armor and colorful house banners hanging from the stone walls. The space is empty of people, with ornate carpets covering the stone floor as the camera pans to take in the medieval decor.

scene_state.functional_zone: Great Hall main chamber with floating candles and Christmas decorations

events.description: camera pans upward revealing thousands of floating candles illuminating the magical ceiling
camera pans around to show the full length of the hall and the floating candle arrangements

agents.ego_description: standing in the Great Hall looking up at the floating candles and admiring the magical ceiling and Christmas tree

entered.detail: thousands of candles floating in mid-air throughout the hall providing warm illumination
massive decorated Christmas tree at the far end of the hall near the windows
long wooden house tables arranged in rows along the hall
enchanted ceiling showing cloudy sky that appears to be open to the weather

segments.scene_description: The camera reveals the magnificent Great Hall interior, panning up to show thousands of floating candles suspended in the air beneath a magical ceiling depicting cloudy skies. The hall features long dining tables, a massive Christmas tree at the far end, and house banners hanging from the stone balconies. The warm candlelight creates a magical atmosphere in the vast Gothic chamber.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright Gothic entrance hall into the magical, candlelit expanse of the Great Hall. It begins by gliding past stone statues and Christmas garlands under high vaulted ceilings, moving through a crowd of robed students before turning toward an imposing carved wooden door. As the doors swing open, the camera steps into a dimly lit vestibule lined with suits of armor and colorful house banners, transitioning from the natural light of the hall to a more intimate, medieval atmosphere. The scene then expands into the magnificent interior of the Great Hall, panning upward to reveal thousands of floating candles suspended beneath a magical, cloudy sky. Finally, the view opens across long dining tables toward a massive Christmas tree, with warm candlelight illuminating the vast Gothic chamber.
